title: Birthday Number Candle, Blue & White Sequin Conch Pearl Shell Birthday Candle Number Cake Topper for Ocean Beach Themed Party Supplies Decoration (8)
features: Package Content: You will receive 1 piece of number birthday candle, coming with a base and a supporting stick, featuring vibrant blue and white colors, which will add a playful and romantic touch to your cake.
Reliable Material: Our birthday candle is made of good-quality paraffin, reliable and long-lasting, and can burn lastly and evenly, clear and bright, bringing warm light for your parties.

Elaborate Design: Our cake number candle features an ocean theme and is adored with conch, shell and pearl, and the main colors are blue and white, looking glittering and attractive. It will add lots of fun to your party.
Personalized Touch: This number candle allows you to easily personalize your cake. Add a romantic twist to birthdays or special events.

Versatile Use: This shell birthday candle can be used in a variety of occasions, such as boys and girls' birthdays, anniversaries, baby showers, beach themed parties, weddings and ocean themed parties and more.
description: Specification: Color: blue, white Material: paraffin Product Size: candle: about 7cm/2.76 inch, supporting stick: 6.5cm/2.56 inch, base: 2.6cm/1.02 inch Package details: 1 x number candle Note: Due to manual measurement, the size and weight may have a certain error. Due to the difference between different monitors, there may be a slight color difference existed.
